description_long: A classic hamburger is presented on a round white plate with a black rim, accompanied by a serving of golden French fries and a portion of creamy coleslaw. The hamburger features a lightly browned sesame seed bun, with crisp green lettuce and a thick beef patty visible beneath the top bun. A layer of mayonnaise or a similar white sauce is spread along the edge, and the patty appears juicy and well-cooked. The French fries are thick-cut and arranged in a small pile next to the burger, while the coleslaw is creamy with visible shreds of cabbage and carrot. The plate is clean and simple, emphasizing the meal's appetizing appearance. The overall presentation is typical of a casual dining or fast-food setting.
description: A sesame seed hamburger with lettuce and sauce sits on a white plate, served with golden fries and creamy coleslaw. The meal is attractively arranged and visually appetizing.
description_view_0: The hamburger is centered on the plate with a small pile of fries to the left; the coleslaw is not visible from this angle.
description_view_1: The hamburger is seen with fries behind it and a portion of coleslaw just coming into view on the right side.
description_view_2: The hamburger is flanked by a generous serving of fries and a visible portion of coleslaw on the left side of the plate.
description_view_3: The hamburger is shown with both fries and a full serving of coleslaw clearly visible to the left, highlighting all side items.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered directly beneath the top bun, with a visible spread of white sauce along the edge. The patty sits below the lettuce, and no other toppings are clearly visible.
